## Run this vertical

Set the env block (paste into your local `.env`) and boot `uvicorn`:

```dotenv
OCT_VERTICAL=building_materials
OCT_RECOMMEND_THRESHOLD=500000
OCT_RECOMMEND_DIRECTION=above
OCT_RECOMMEND_ENTITY_TYPE=CustomerAccount
OCT_RECOMMEND_ENTITY_ID_FIELD=account_id
OCT_RECOMMEND_LABEL="credit over limit"
OCT_RECOVERY_VALUE=450000
OCT_RECOVERY_DESCRIPTION="exposure back within limit"
```
